sections.paragraph:
περίπτωσις, εως, ἡ (πτῶσις; Stoic. II p. 29; Ammonius Gr. [100 a.d.] p. 60 Valck.: ‘misfortune’; M. Ant. 6, 41, 1 π. τοῦ κακοῦ al.) experience, in this case an unpleasant one, calamity (w. συμφορά) 1 Cl 1:1.—DELG s.v. πίπτω.

Stoic Stoic , various dates—List 5

Ammonius Gr Ammonius Gr , a.k.a. Ammonius Hist., of uncertain identity, I/II? a.d.—List 5

  1. Ant. M. Ant. = Marcus Aurelius Antoninus, II a.d.—List 5
  2. al. =alibi (elsewhere), aliter (otherwise), alii (others)

1 Cl 1 Cl = 1 Clement—List 1

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

s.v. s.v. = sub voce (under the word, look up the word)

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 804
